caption: The video features a man standing at a podium, delivering a speech. He is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white kurta and a beige vest. The setting appears to be formal, with a decorative wall featuring a mosaic pattern in the background. To his right, there is a tall, slender structure adorned with red flowers. The man gestures with his left hand as he speaks, emphasizing his points. His expression is serious and engaged, suggesting that he is addressing an important topic. The microphones on the podium indicate that his speech is being amplified for an audience. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of importance and formality.
